metadata.name: Moderate Toxic Behavior in Voice Chat

description: A player is reported for using abusive and toxic language in the in-game voice chat.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the player report and the associated voice chat log.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accesses the report and a transcript of the voice chat.

nodes.task_description: Review the transcript for violations of the community code of conduct.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the player used language that violates the code of conduct.

nodes.task_description: Issue a 7-day voice chat suspension to the offending player.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the communication ban to the player's account.
